ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordTypeId ='012b0000000M3zQ', /* News Sale/Upsell */ ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Upsell'), ISCHANGED(StageName), Probability >= 0.25, ISNULL(Upsell_Type__c), MEDPIC_Next_Stage__c =false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must select a value in "Upsell Type" if Stage is "Sales Qualified" or higher and the Type is "Upsell"
